content: The question is not, "Is Doresain competing with gHelot in any way, shape, or form"
The question is, "Are you hot for Doresain?" and this dictates your priorities like a form of mind control
Who does Faros ideally want for team members?

The big boon to Faros is that she's blue, so her existing in your team means you have a decent shield, and there are characters who can trigger more tentacle attacks that don't fit into the original poison team she would be running in, like Murphy, Celeste, or Caecus. Like every other standard Aequor Awakener, she gets along with anything vaguely colored in blue. She slightly increases tentacle damage and inflicts much more poison than normal alongside characters who cause tentacles to attack more often, which is a very common gimmick (Aurita, Tulu, Celeste, Caecus, etc.) 

The big problem with Faros is that she doesn't do the things that stronger supports who would ordinarily take her place would do; she has no means of generating Aliemus for her teammates like Miryam or gDoll would, she doesn't reduce the cost of the cards she's fetching like Ramona or Thais would, and she doesn't generate power or increase the amount of arithmetica you have in your deck like Horla or Hameln would.

Since she uses and triggers poison, she gets along well with anyone who also inflicts or triggers poison, as long as they're a character that actually functions as a character (so not Liz or Nymphaea.) She scales off of damage amplification, so some weird wheels of destiny come into play that wouldn't ordinarily matter. Since she has an exalt that requires some thought to use, and it isn't one that you just hammer off cooldown, she kind of benefits from having an overexalt simply because she'll overcap a lot and it's useful against niche bosses that inflict vulnerability on you; it's good to keep in mind her relative strengths against the content, rather than against competing Awakeners. Anyone who dumps an absolute mess of god awful shit in your deck all the time or, naturally, anyone that inflicts Vulnerable makes Faros matter more.

I originally discounted this, but she actually probably could work with Agrippa and Thais. The big problem with Agrippa is usually that she's a Caro character, not that Agrippa herself is unusable, and a lot of the poison composition characters are Chaos or Aequor, so you lock yourself out of a strictly better team comp because Agrippa comes at the cost of not one, but usually two better options. If those units are in use in a different party, however, Agrippa becomes a lot easier to put into a team with Faros.
I do have two copies of Agrippa not that that's a lot in this game but it's still there lmao and I also like the character I think it's hilarious she swears at you in some of her quotes
Agrippa by herself wouldn't be ideal though you are saying?

Agrippa being a poison centric character with no Caro poisoners to support is her biggest issue. She triggers a little of the poison on the enemy, but doesn't inflict enough of it by herself to make that a win condition. I think the strongest poison characters to go in a composition like that are all Chaos characters, with special mention to 24 only being a poisoner in Aequor compositions, which means Agrippa is a choice between literally all Aequor poisoners or literally all Chaos poisoners and Agrippa by herself, and that's not really a choice. Those teams end up being half and half in most cases.
She's certainly in a better position than Liz, who is facing the same problem of not having a lot of functional Ultra poisoners, but is also bad at her job.

Stellar Chapters have a soft cap for poison and a hard cap for battle duration, but they also introduce a bunch of relics to make it pop off more often, so... it plays differently.
